Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

Analytics

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

# WHERE LIFE FOREVER SPARKLES

- [Discover More](https://baccaratresidencesmiami.com/#aboutus)

Baccarat proudly presents its first collection of residences to the Miami market.

Illuminated by the infinite shimmer of the sun, this soaring tower will stand radiant on the waterfront where the river meets the bay, in the heart of the bright lights of the city. Combining the sparkling vitality and magnetic dynamism of Brickell with enlightened design and artful service, residents can expect a lifestyle infused with unexpected delights and inspired brilliance.

Penthouse residences available for exclusive preview.

![](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/image01.png?v=5f55ace4)

WHERE LIFE FOREVER SPARKLES

[En español](https://es.baccarat-brickell.com/)

[⬆︎](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#gototop)

[![#home](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/image10.png?v=5f55ace4)](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#home)

## THE ULTIMATE EXPRESSION OF ONE OF THE WORLD’S MOST RAREFIED AESTHETICS, REFINED OVER CENTURIES, PERFECTED IN THE HEART OF BRICKELL

BACCARAT PROUDLY PRESENTS ITS FIRST COLLECTION OF RESIDENCES TO THE MIAMI MARKET. ILLUMINATED BY THE INFINITE SHIMMER OF THE SUN, THIS SOARING TOWER WILL STAND RADIANT ON THE WATERFRONT WHERE THE RIVER MEETS THE BAY, IN THE HEART OF THE GLITTERING LIGHTS OF THE CITY COMBINING THE BEST OF BRICKELL WITH ENLIGHTENED DESIGN, ARTFUL SERVICE AND ENLIVENING WATERFRONT AMENITIES.

**[Residences](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#residences)**

**[Floor Plans](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#floorplans)**

**[Amenities](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#amenities)**

**[River flats](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#riverflats)**

**[Latest News](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#news)**

**[Location](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#location)**

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#prices)**

**[Contact Us](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#contact)**

![](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/image06.jpg?v=5f55ace4)

![](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/image05.jpg?v=5f55ace4)

### 75 stories and 360 residences.

## The Residences

• Open-concept, flow-through contemporary floor plans featuring one, two, three and four-bedroom residences and penthouses• Private key activated elevator access and entry vestibules in all residences with two elevators opening directly to each residence• Energy-efficient, tinted, impact-resistant floor-to-ceiling sliding glass doors and windows with panoramic views of Biscayne Bay, the Miami River and the Miami city lights and skyline from every residence• Expansive eight-foot-deep private terraces, and wrap around terraces at corner units, with glass railings for unobstructed views• Generous smooth-finish ten-foot high ceilings in typical floors soaring to eleven and twelve feet in penthouse levels

Click the photos for more details

- [![Great Room](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/gallery02/6d7cb780_original.jpg?v=5f55ace4)
- [![Terrace Views](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/gallery02/a0734980_original.jpg?v=5f55ace4)

- [![Master Bedroom](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/gallery02/084a7f85_original.jpg?v=5f55ace4)
- [![Master Bath](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/gallery02/5f2c67b9.jpg?v=5f55ace4)](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/gallery02/5f2c67b9_original.jpg?v=5f55ace4)
- [![Double vanities & Porcelain Tiles](<Base64-Image-Removed>)](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/gallery02/bf2b538d_original.jpg?v=5f55ace4)

![](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/image16.jpg?v=5f55ace4)

## Baccarat Residences

Baccarat Residences Miami introduces the city to one of the most prestigious luxury hotel brands in the world. The Baccarat tower will feature 75 stories and 360 residences.

**[Prices & Payment Plan](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#prices)**

**[Floor Plans](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#floorplans)**

**[Location](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#location)**

**[Contact Us](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#contact)**

### Spectacular Common Areas

## Luxury Amenities

• Elegant porte-cochère entrance• State-of-the-art fully equipped fitness center• Private marina• Luxurious Clubroom• Private screening room• Wine Cellar and Tasting Room• Pool Deck

• 24-hour attended security services and controlled access• Lushly landscaped wide promenade along the Miami River connecting to the Miami Circle National Historic Landmark park• Elevated waterfront amenities deck with infinity pool offering unparalleled views across the Miami River and Biscayne Bay• Elevated 12th level amenities resort deck loaded with a dramatic zero-entry heated saline swimming pool, outdoor spa, pool-side cabanas, summer kitchen area and beautifully landscaped sun terrace• Business Center with conference facilities and private work spaces

Click the photos for more details

![](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/image03.jpg?v=5f55ace4)

[Prices](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#prices) \| [Location](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#location) \| [Contact Us](https://baccarat-brickell.com/#contact)

### Pricing & Payment Structure

## River Flats

The loft-style condo units, called River Flats on the lower floors of Baccarat, are simply spectacular, featuring 2 to 3 bedroom configurations.These Bay Liners Condos are located directly on the Miami River, with a fantastic view of boats and yachts against the backdrop of the most spectacular buildings in Downtown. Enjoy the most relaxing maritime life, with manatees, dolphins and the most luxurious boats from the comfort of your living room, with high ceilings and natural light in all rooms. These types of luxury apartments are rare and very special, providing a great capacity for future price appreciation.

![](https://baccarat-brickell.com/assets/images/image02.jpg?v=5f55ace4)

### BRICKELL

## MAP AND LOCATION

[444 Brickell Ave, Miami, FL 33131](https://www.google.com/maps/place/444+Brickell+Ave,+Miami,+FL+33131,+EE.+UU./@25.7690781,-80.192512,17z/data=!4m5!3m4!1s0x88d9b69cd4343ebd:0x94537a6aec3bc977!8m2!3d25.7690781!4d-80.1903233?coh=164777&entry=tt&shorturl=1)
